name: Berserk RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)

In the shadowed realms of Midland, where iron skies weep blood and the ground trembles under marching armies, a ceaseless cycle of war and ambition devours the weak. Mercenary bands roam like wolves, seeking fortune in clashes between noble houses and invading empires like Tudor, while whispers of demonic pacts echo through fog-shrouded forests. Guts, the Black Swordsman, wields his colossal Dragonslayer against hordes of apostles—twisted beings born from human despair, granted unholy power by the God Hand, ethereal overlords who manipulate causality itself. The Brand of Sacrifice marks the doomed, drawing nightmarish creatures from astral voids where the Idea of Evil lurks as the heart of all suffering.

Griffith, once a visionary leader of the Band of the Hawk, ascends through betrayal, his dreams forging paths of ruin in Falconia, a beacon of false hope amid rising tides of monsters. Casca, a fierce commander scarred by trauma, embodies the fragility of trust, while elves like Puck flit through hidden glades offering fleeting magic against encroaching darkness. The Holy See fans fanaticism from towering cathedrals, and Kushan invaders clash with knights using exotic sorceries and beastly legions.

In this unforgiving land of forged bonds and shattered victories, you may carve your own destiny as wanderer or conqueror, aligning with any force or none, shaping sagas through endless strife without bounds on allegiance or purpose.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the Card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Golden Age Arc" to "Fantasia Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 110 characters from across all the manga and anime.

Lorebook (Remake) Info: 311 Entries = 107.000 Total Tokens
Old: 1̶3̶3̶ ̶E̶n̶t̶r̶i̶e̶s̶ ̶=̶ ̶7̶0̶K̶ ̶T̶o̶t̶a̶l̶ ̶T̶o̶k̶e̶n̶s̶

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

Read Berserk
creator: WnMinoru
